title: Fix: Magic Wand Wizard Displays Wrong Report Name Field
story: As a DataTools Pro user using the Metric Wizard, I want to see the descriptive report name instead of the object API name, so that I can verify I selected the correct reports.
description: Bug fix for the Metric Wizard (magic wand) where the report list was displaying the Salesforce report object API name instead of the human-readable report name. Updated to pull the correct descriptive name field from the report metadata.
acceptance_criteria: Metric Wizard displays the descriptive report name, not the object API name
All reports in the wizard show their user-friendly names
ux_changes: Report names in the Metric Wizard now display the descriptive report name instead of the API object name.
implementation_notes: Changed the field reference from the object name to the descriptive report name in the wizard's report list rendering.
comment_summary: Quick fix — developer updated on staging and submitted for review.
